content.text:
<user_query>
You are an expert translator/terminologist working on a Shokz product terminology database.

Read ALL English-language Meet and Spec markdown files under:
`c:\Users\016551\OneDrive\Desktop\流程建设\统一表述知识库\Meet&Spec md文件`

These are the English files (NOT French):
- OpenDots ONE: OpenDotsOne MEET_US(四色).md, OpenDotsOne Spec Sheet  四色_US.md
- OpenFit: OpenFit Meet US.md, OPENFIT Spec Sheet 锁定-仅能修改价格.md
- OpenFit Pro: (English) OpenFit Pro MEET.md
- OpenRun Pro 2: MEET已校对0725.md, [English] OpenRun Pro 2 Spec_202510.md
- OpenRun Pro: OPENRUN PRO MEET US.md, OPENRUN PRO Spec Sheet US.md
- OpenRun Pro Mini: OPENRUN PRO Mini MEET (US).md, OPENRUN PRO Mini Spec (US).md
- OpenRun: Shokz Openrun meet.md, Shokz Openrun Spec.md
- OpenRun Mini: OpenRun Mini meet.md, OpenRun Mini_Spec_Sheet.md
- OpenMove: Shokz openmove meet.md, Shokz openmove Spec.md
- OpenSwim: Shokz OpenSwim meet.md, Shokz OpenSwim Spec.md
- OpenSwim Pro: [English]OPENSWIM PRO_MEET.md, [English]OpenSwim Pro Spec Sheet-20260119.md
- OpenComm: Shokz OpenComm Meet.md, Shokz OpenComm Spec.md
- OpenComm UC: Opencomm UC-Meet 100.md, Opencomm UC-Meet 110.md, Opencomm UC spec (100A).md, Opencomm UC spec (110C).md
- OpenComm2 UC: Opencomm 2UC-Meet(USB-C).md, OpenComm 2UC Spec Sheet-USBC-北美.md
- OpenComm2 UC 2025 Upgrade: Opencomm 2UC 2025upgrade-Meet.md
- OpenMeet: US_OpenMeet_Meet.md, US & CA_OpenMeet Spec.md
- RoadWave: Shokz RoadWave英文折页.md

For each file, extract:
1. **Feature/selling point phrases** (e.g. "Open-ear design", "All-day comfort", "Quick Charge", "Situational awareness")
2. **Technical terms** (e.g. "Bone conduction", "DualPitch™", "IP55", "MultiPoint Pairing")
3. **Action/instruction phrases** (e.g. "Simply press a button to adjust the volume...", "Switch between Bluetooth and MP3 modes...", "mute and unmute during calls")
4. **Product category descriptions** (e.g. "Bone Conduction Sports Headphones", "Open-Ear True Wireless Earbuds")
5. **Spec parameter names** (e.g. "Frequency response", "Sensitivity", "Standby time", "Continuous play")
6. **Taglines/slogans** (e.g. "Be Open To Pushing Your Limits", "Water to Land, the Music Never Ends")

For EACH extracted phrase, note:
- The exact English text as it appears
- Which file(s) it appears in
- Category (术语/卖点/动作/品类名/规格参数/标语)

Return the complete list as a structured dataset. Be thorough - extract every reusable phrase. This is for building a translation memory database. Phrases that appear in multiple files are especially important.
</user_query>

正在列出目录并读取您列出的所有英文 Meet/Spec Markdown 文件，随后整理为结构化术语表。

[REDACTED]

分批读取所有英文文件内容。

[REDACTED]

以下数据集基于您列出的 **32 个英文 Markdown源文件** 全文通读整理；**英文原文按源文件实际写法保留**（含 `TM`/`™`、大小写、断行合并后的完整短句）。路径均为绝对路径。

**说明**

- `MEET已校对0725.md`（OpenRun Pro 2 Meet）OCR/排版损坏严重，**仅收录可辨认的英文片段**；与 `[English] OpenRun Pro 2 Spec_202510.md` 中表述一致的，已在「跨文件高频」中合并。
- 部分 Spec 表在 Markdown 里**行列错位**（如 OpenDots Spec、OpenComm Spec），参数名仍以表头/正文出现的英文为准。
- **类别**：`术语` = 技术/品牌名等；`卖点` = 功能与价值陈述；`动作` = 操作/使用说明；`品类名` = 产品定位/品类；`规格参数` = 规格字段名；`标语` = 口号/标题型 slogan。

---

## 一、跨文件高频（翻译记忆优先）

| English（原文） | 出现文件（绝对路径） | 类别 |
|---|---|---|
| Open-Ear Design | `...\OpenFit\OpenFit Meet US.md`; `...\OpenFit\OPENFIT Spec Sheet 锁定-仅能修改价格.md`; `...\OpenRun Pro\OPENRUN PRO Spec Sheet US.md`; `...\OpenRun Pro Mini\OPENRUN PRO Mini Spec (US).md`; `...\OpenRun\Shokz Openrun Spec.md`; `...\OpenRun Mini\OpenRun Mini_Spec_Sheet.md`; `...\OpenMove\Shokz openmove Spec.md`; `...\OpenSwim Pro\[English]OpenSwim Pro Spec Sheet-20260119.md`; `...\Opencomm UC\Opencomm UC-Meet 100.md`; `...\Opencomm UC\Opencomm UC-Meet 110.md`; `...\OpenComm 2UC\Opencomm 2UC-Meet(USB-C).md`; `...\OpenComm 2UC\OpenComm 2UC Spec Sheet-USBC-北美.md`; `...\OpenMeet\US & CA_OpenMeet Spec.md` 等 | 卖点 |
| All Day Comfort / All-Day Comfort / all-day comfort | `...\Opencomm UC\Opencomm UC-Meet 100.md`; `...\Opencomm UC\Opencomm UC-Meet 110.md`; `...\OpenComm 2UC\Opencomm 2UC-Meet(USB-C).md`; `...\OpenComm2 2025 Upgrade\Opencomm 2UC 2025upgrade-Meet.md`; `...\OpenRun Pro\OPENRUN PRO MEET US.md`; `...\OpenRun Pro Mini\OPENRUN PRO Mini MEET (US).md`; `...\OpenDots ONE\OpenDotsOne MEET_US(四色).md`; `...\RoadWave\Shokz RoadWave英文折页.md` 等 | 卖点 |

| Quick Charge / quick charge | `...\OpenFit\OPENFIT Spec Sheet 锁定-仅能修改价格.md`; `...\OpenRun Pro\OPENRUN PRO MEET US.md`; `...\OpenRun Pro\OPENRUN PRO Spec Sheet US.md`; `...\OpenRun Pro Mini\OPENRUN PRO Mini MEET (US).md`; `...\OpenRun Pro Mini\OPENRUN PRO Mini Spec (US).md`; `...\OpenComm\Shokz OpenComm Meet.md`; `...\OpenComm\Shokz OpenComm Spec.md`; `...\Opencomm UC\Opencomm UC-Meet 100.md`; `...\Opencomm UC\Opencomm UC-Meet 110.md`; `...\OpenComm 2UC\Opencomm 2UC-Meet(USB-C).md`; `...\OpenComm 2UC\OpenComm 2UC Spec Sheet-USBC-北美.md`; `...\OpenComm2 2025 Upgrade\Opencomm 2UC 2025upgrade-Meet.md`; `...\OpenMeet\US_OpenMeet_Meet.md`; `...\OpenMeet\US & CA_OpenMeet Spec.md`; `...\OpenRun Pro 2\[English] OpenRun Pro 2 Spec_202510.md`; `...\OpenSwim Pro\[English]OPENSWIM PRO_MEET.md`; `...\OpenSwim Pro\[English]OpenSwim Pro Spec Sheet-20260119.md`; `...\RoadWave\Shokz RoadWave英文折页.md` | 卖点 / 规格参数 |
| Multipoint Pairing / MultiPoint Pairing / Bluetooth® Multipoint | `...\OpenDots ONE\OpenDotsOne MEET_US(四色).md`; `...\OpenDots ONE\OpenDotsOne Spec Sheet  四色_US.md`; `...\OpenMove\Shokz openmove meet.md`; `...\OpenRun Pro\OPENRUN PRO MEET US.md`; `...\OpenSwim Pro\[English]OPENSWIM PRO_MEET.md`; `...\Opencomm UC\Opencomm UC-Meet 100.md`; `...\Opencomm UC\Opencomm UC-Meet 110.md`; `...\OpenComm 2UC\Opencomm 2UC-Meet(USB-C).md`; `...\OpenComm2 2025 Upgrade\Opencomm 2UC 2025upgrade-Meet.md`; `...\OpenMeet\US_OpenMeet_Meet.md` | 术语 / 卖点 |

| Shokz Connect | `...\OpenComm 2UC\Opencomm 2UC-Meet(USB-C).md`; `...\OpenComm2 2025 Upgrade\Opencomm 2UC 2025upgrade-Meet.md`; `...\OpenMeet\US_OpenMeet_Meet.md` | 术语 |

## 三、规格字段名全集（去重合并）

以下英文**字段名/表头**在多个 Spec 中重复出现，适合作为 TM 的「参数轴」：

`Part number`; `Model number`; `SKU`; `Product name`; `Speaker type`; `Frequency response`; `Sensitivity` / `Speaker sensitivity`; `Microphone sensitivity`; `Bluetooth® version`; `Compatible profiles`; `Compatible configuration files`; `Charge voltage` / `Charging voltage`; `Maximum charge voltage`; `Speaker impedance`; `Frequency band` / `Operating frequency`; `Wireless range` / `Wireless Range`; `Maximum RF output power`; `Materials` / `Exterior Material`; `Battery`; `Battery capacity`; `Continuous play`; `Talk time`; `Listen time`; `Standby time`; `Charge time`; `Quick charge`; `Charge type` / `Corded charging`; `Weight`; `Net weight`; `Gross weight`; `Warranty`; `Sweat resistance` / `Sweat/Water resistance` / `Water resistant` / `Water Resistance`; `Audio codecs supported`; `Compatible File Types`; `Dimension`; `PACKAGING DIMENSIONS`; `Carton`; `Cube`; `Height`; `Width`; `Length`; `Chip`; `Visual indicator`; `Adapter button`; `Operating temperature`; `Storage temperature`; `Connection (computer and mobile devices)`; `OS compatibility (as audio device)`; `Simultaneous wireless connections`; `Paired devices`; `Simultaneous Bluetooth connections`; `Bluetooth® Multipoint`; `Bluetooth® profiles`; `Software & Apps` / `Compatible software and/or apps`; `Category name`; `Wireless transmission type`; `Product color`; `GENERAL INFOMATION`（原文拼写）; `HARDWARE SPECIFICATION`; `SOFTWARE SPECIFICATION`.

---

## 四、使用建议（面向翻译记忆）

1. **先锁定「跨文件高频」表**中的写法（如 `Open-Ear Design`、`Quick Charge`、`Multipoint Pairing`），再处理各产品线独有口号（OpenSwim Pro、OpenRun Pro 等）。  
2. **注意商标与数字写法**：`DirectPitchTM` / `DirectPitch™`、`Bluetooth®`、`Dolby Atmos`、`Qi`、`Zoom Certified` 等建议在 TM 中**单独建条目**并固定译法。  
3. **动作句**（如 OpenComm2 UC 的 mute/unmute、OpenSwim Pro 的 mode 切换）宜按**完整子句**入库，避免拆得过碎导致译序混乱。
